title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced reaches record player count despite criticism over microtransactions and layoffs
summary: Ubisoft's remake sells 2 million in one day and sets the highest concurrent player count on Steam for the franchise, while players criticize microtransactions and the company lays off employees in Barcelona.

title: Bethesda union protests Xbox layoffs while a Skyrim modder shows solidarity
summary: Union members march in front of the studios, a 27-year employee is laid off, and the community creates supportive content in response to Microsoft's restructuring.

title: Microsoft denies racist theory about layoffs and Xbox executive joins Federal Reserve task force
summary: The company clarifies that its CEO Asha Sharma was born in the U.S., and she joins a government task force on employment following the massive cuts.

title: id Software assures it has the necessary team to continue developing its games after Xbox layoffs
summary: The Doom studio responds to concerns about its future and states that it retains key personnel to create the technology for which they are known.

title: Robert Yang and other developers denounce Steam's censorship of experimental LGBTQ+ games
summary: Valve's platform makes it difficult to publish homosexual content according to the creators, who offer their game collection for free.

title: Palworld modifies its most controversial creatures for its 1.0 launch and announces a price discount
summary: The survival game adjusts designs that resembled Pokémon and makes an economic decision that will benefit players.

title: Valve prepares Steam Frame and the Steam Machine receives verification badges on the store
summary: New categories and compatibilities appear on the platform, indicating an imminent launch of the Steam Frame format.

title: id co-founder John Carmack speaks out on Xbox layoffs without anger but with disappointment
summary: Carmack says he cannot get angry about the cuts, but they mar the atmosphere of the studio's founders' meeting.

title: Rockstar reveals date and details of the Kortz Center heist in GTA Online with a new level of replayability
summary: The new heist promises a unique and repeatable experience according to the company.

title: Marvel Rivals turns one of its worst heroes into one of the best after two years
summary: An update significantly improves a character that was considered among the weakest in the game.

title: Pokémon Go celebrates its tenth anniversary by recreating the Mewtwo raid in Times Square
summary: The mobile game repeats the promotional event from its original trailer with a big raid in New York.

title: Square Enix finally allows disabling the annoying fairy in Adventures of Elliot after complaints
summary: A patch completely removed the voice of the character that players found irritating.

title: Two games delay their launch on Nintendo Switch 2 due to September's saturated schedule
summary: Hell Is Us and another important title postpone their release to avoid competition in a very busy month.

title: EU states it cannot force Sony to continue manufacturing physical games for PlayStation
summary: The consumer rights commissioner responds without satisfying requests to preserve the physical format.

title: GTA 6 announces preload date and details about digital and physical copies
summary: Rockstar reveals important information on how to access the game before launch.

title: Naruto confirms live-action film directed by the director of Spider-Man: Brand New Day
summary: The live-action adaptation of the popular manga joins Hollywood's trend with the Marvel filmmaker.

title: God of War Laufey will have a physical edition, pointing to a 2027 release
summary: Sony confirms that the anticipated title will have a disc version, almost ensuring its release date.

title: Minecraft incorporates a feature awaited by players for 17 years
summary: The update allows players to make creations that previously required cheats and opens up new possibilities.

title: Emblem editor in the Black Ops 2 port allows creating swastikas, generating controversy
summary: Players discover that the preserved feature from the original game can be used for offensive symbols.

title: Xbox appoints a firm believer of the metaverse as chief strategist
summary: The hiring indicates a possible renewed interest from Microsoft in the metaverse despite recent cuts.
